### create() - Default Template

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.1.1/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance from the default 'base' sandbox template.

```APIDOC
## create() - Default Template

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance from the default 'base' sandbox template.

### Method
`POST`

### Endpoint
`/sandboxes` (Conceptual)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
None

#### Query Parameters
None

#### Request Body
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional. Connection options for the sandbox.

### Request Example
```ts
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create();
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **InstanceType<S>** - A sandbox instance for the newly created sandbox.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "sandbox-789",
  "status": "running"
}
```
```

--------------------------------

### create() - Specific Template

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.1.1/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template.

```APIDOC
## create() - Specific Template

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template.

### Method
`POST`

### Endpoint
`/sandboxes` (Conceptual)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
None

#### Query Parameters
None

#### Request Body
- **template** (string) - Required. The name or ID of the sandbox template.
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional. Connection options for the sandbox.

### Request Example
```ts
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create('<template-name-or-id>');
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **InstanceType<S>** - A sandbox instance for the newly created sandbox.

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "sandbox-012",
  "status": "running"
}
```
```

### create() - Specified Template

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.1.4/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template.

```APIDOC
## create() - Specified Template

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template.

### Method
`static create<S>(this: S, template: string, opts?: SandboxOpts): Promise<InstanceType<S>>`

### Endpoint
N/A (Static Method)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
N/A

#### Query Parameters
N/A

#### Request Body
N/A

### Parameters
- **template** (string) - Required - The name or ID of the sandbox template to use.
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional - Options for sandbox creation.

### Request Example
```typescript
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create('<template-name-or-id>');
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **InstanceType<S>** (Promise<InstanceType<S>>) - A promise that resolves to the newly created sandbox instance.

#### Response Example
```typescript
// Returns a sandbox instance
```
```

--------------------------------

### create (default template)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.0.2/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance from the default 'base' sandbox template.

```APIDOC
## create (default template)

### Description
Create a new sandbox from the default `base` sandbox template.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/sandboxes

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
None

#### Query Parameters
- **opts** (object) - Optional - Connection options.
  - **requestTimeoutMs** (number) - Optional - Request timeout in milliseconds.
  - **env** (object) - Optional - Environment variables to set in the sandbox.
  - **cpu** (string) - Optional - CPU type for the sandbox (e.g., 'standard', 'large').
  - **memory** (string) - Optional - Memory size for the sandbox (e.g., 'standard', 'large').
  - **disk** (string) - Optional - Disk size for the sandbox (e.g., 'standard', 'large').

### Request Body
This endpoint does not have a request body.

### Request Example
```json
{
  "opts": {
    "requestTimeoutMs": 30000,
    "env": {
      "MY_VAR": "my_value"
    }
  }
}
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **sandboxId** (string) - The ID of the newly created sandbox.
- **instance** (object) - The sandbox instance details.
  - **sandboxId** (string) - The ID of the sandbox.
  - **ipAddress** (string) - The IP address of the sandbox.
  - **status** (string) - The current status of the sandbox (e.g., 'running', 'stopped').

#### Response Example
```json
{
  "sandboxId": "sandbox-12345",
  "instance": {
    "sandboxId": "sandbox-12345",
    "ipAddress": "192.168.1.100",
    "status": "running"
  }
}
```
```

--------------------------------

```APIDOC

### Sandbox Creation Example (TypeScript)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/desktop-js-sdk/v2.0.1/sandbox/page.mdx

An example demonstrating how to create a new sandbox instance using the `Sandbox.create` method. Replace '<template-name-or-id>' with the actual template name or ID.

```typescript
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create('<template-name-or-id>')

```

--------------------------------

### Create New Sandbox Instance (Python)

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/python-sdk/v1.2.0/sandbox_async/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance using the `create` class method. Supports custom templates, timeouts, environment variables, and API key authentication. Use this instead of the constructor.

```python
await AsyncSandbox.create(template='my-template', timeout=600, envs={'VAR': 'value'}, api_key='your_api_key')
```

--------------------------------

### betaCreate() - Specified Template

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/js-sdk/v2.1.4/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template. This method is marked as Beta.

```APIDOC
## betaCreate() - Specified Template

### Description
Creates a new sandbox instance from a specified sandbox template. This feature is in beta.

### Method
`static betaCreate<S>(this: S, template: string, opts?: SandboxBetaCreateOpts): Promise<InstanceType<S>>`

### Endpoint
N/A (Static Method)

### Parameters
#### Path Parameters
N/A

#### Query Parameters
N/A

#### Request Body
N/A

### Parameters
- **template** (string) - Required - The name or ID of the sandbox template to use.
- **opts** (SandboxBetaCreateOpts) - Optional - Options for sandbox creation.

### Request Example
```typescript
const sandbox = await Sandbox.betaCreate('<template-name-or-id>');
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **InstanceType<S>** (Promise<InstanceType<S>>) - A promise that resolves to the newly created sandbox instance.

#### Response Example
```typescript
// Returns a sandbox instance
```
```

--------------------------------

### Sandbox.create() - default template

Source: https://github.com/e2b-dev/e2b/blob/main/apps/web/src/app/(docs)/docs/sdk-reference/desktop-js-sdk/v1.9.2/sandbox/page.mdx

Creates a new sandbox instance from the default 'desktop' sandbox template.

```APIDOC
## POST /sandbox/create

### Description
Create a new sandbox from the default `desktop` sandbox template.

### Method
POST

### Endpoint
/sandbox/create

### Parameters
#### Request Body
- **opts** (SandboxOpts) - Optional - Connection options for the sandbox.

### Request Example
```ts
const sandbox = await Sandbox.create()
```

### Response
#### Success Response (200)
- **sandboxInstance** (object) - An instance of the created sandbox.

#### Response Example
{
  "sandboxInstance": "[sandbox object]"
}
```
